question: Is the image presented in a strict top-down (bird's-eye) perspective?
Is there a round table with exactly four seats positioned at the top, right, bottom, and left of the frame?
Are all four specific mug colors present (red, yellow, green, and blue)?
Are all four specific pastries present (brownie square, croissant, donut, and triangular cake slice)?
Does each of the four seats contain exactly one mug and one pastry?
Is the Croissant placed at the topmost seat in the frame?
Is the Blue Mug located at the rightmost seat (clockwise-adjacent to the Croissant)?
Is the Green Mug positioned directly opposite the Brownie?
Is the Yellow Mug placed at a seat adjacent to the Triangular Cake Slice (but not at the same seat)?
Is the Donut positioned directly opposite the Red Mug (satisfying the condition of being neither at the same seat nor adjacent)?
Is the image free of any visible text, logos, labels, or watermarks?
